title: viguiera cordifolia var. genuina
intro: Viguiera cordifolia var. genuina, also known as the tree daisy or false daisy, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Viguiera cordifolia var. genuina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
